'''Von Taub''' was a prestigious [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who attended the meeting led by [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], in [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo Town]]. Then, he helped [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Astri Oddo]] to find the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1st}}
